meta.title: Battlegrounds: A Book Discussion with H.R. McMaster
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Lieutenant General H.R. McMaster, U.S. Army (Ret.) on his new book Battlegrounds: The Fight to Defend the Free World. The discussion will be moderated by Hudson Institute Asia-Pacific Security Chair Patrick M. Cronin.
